Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Moongrave]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 5''' — Moongrave is a location where Lindon and Dross have been researching.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The west coast of the Blackflame Continent is closer to them than Moongrave was.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Mercy sits in a shadow aura cultivation room at the heart of Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Douji and Courage treated Lindon poorly in Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Moongrave is a location where Charity is found.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Akura Justice examined Lindon's spirit in Moongrave.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Moongrave is a dark city with spires of smooth black stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The cloudship was drifting over Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Malice used a tower beneath Moongrave to send people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Moongrave has an aura that is rich and thick compared to Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon vanished from Moongrave.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon's family and cloud fortress are at Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Eithan set up transportation between Refuge and Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Moongrave is a city where Akura Malice's voice can be heard by everyone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Malice abandoned Moongrave.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Mercy is stuck in Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Charity ordered a retreat to Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Moongrave is connected to the Tower via a portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Moongrave is a location with black walls similar to those of Shatterspine Castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — The Wandering Titan is on a course to Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 8''' — Moongrave is a city.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Moongrave has dark skies and cold winds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 12''' — Moongrave contains a guest house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Moongrave is a city with script-circles worked into its foundation for defense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Moongrave has walls with scripts at the base.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Moongrave is a city with a construct network of defenders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — The Silent King's dream technique washed over Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Moongrave was on fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Moongrave has a dream script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Dreadgod focuses its will on the city of Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Moongrave is the heart of the Ashwind continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Mercy thought they were in Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Moongrave is a location where Lindon, Yerin, and Mercy arrive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Moongrave has walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Moongrave provides support to keep Lindon locked down.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Mercy's father is not mentioned much in Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 9''' — Moongrave is a location near where Reigan Shen returned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Moongrave is a location Lindon and Northstrider might return to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Malice ran to Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Moongrave was attacked by the Wandering Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Northstrider returns to Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — The crowd in the new world was less colorful than one might expect in Moongrave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Moongrave is a location mentioned alongside Serpent's Grave.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Moongrave is a location where flowers can be plucked.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
